dag.dag_name: Inventory reconciliation delay cascades into Pricing repricing

tasks.dependencies: Waits on upstream domain A DAG completion
Waits on upstream domain B DAG completion
Waits on upstream domain C DAG completion
Requires all 3 upstream domains to have completed
Consolidates Ecommerce data across upstream domains

operator_config.sql: SELECT 1 AS autorca_probe, 'RTL_ECM_CASC' AS dag_id, 'consolidate_ecm' AS task_name;

tasks.dependencies: Compares actual start time to expected upstream-completion time
Branch: no material cascade delay detected
Branch: cascade delay detected, triggers cross-DAG AutoRCA
Notifies stakeholders of cascade impact with root-cause chain

operator_config.sql: SELECT 1 AS autorca_probe, 'RTL_ECM_CASC' AS dag_id, 'load_target' AS task_name;

incident.incident_name: Inventory reconciliation delay cascades into Pricing repricing
incident.description: Cascading Delay incident on the Ecommerce pipeline (RTL_ECM_CASC): inventory reconciliation delay cascades into Pricing repricing.
incident.symptoms: Pricing repricing DAG, dependent on same-day Inventory reconciliation via cross-DAG sensor, is delayed 2h20m.
incident.root_cause: Inventory reconciliation (Warehouse domain) ran long due to new dark-store volume, and Pricing's dependency is a hard blocking sensor rather than a partial/dataset-based trigger, so any upstream delay fully propagates.
incident.business_impact: Store and ecommerce prices remain un-refreshed into the morning, causing customer-facing price mismatches during the first hours of trading.
incident.resolution: Move to Airflow Datasets so Pricing can begin partial processing on partitions already reconciled, rather than waiting on the full upstream DAG.

expected_rca.expected_rca_summary: AI AutoRCA should identify: Inventory reconciliation (Warehouse domain) ran long due to new dark-store volume, and Pricing's dependency is a hard blocking sensor rather than a partial/dataset-based trigger, so any upstream delay fully propagates.
expected_rca.evidence_required: Airflow task logs, Datadog infrastructure/application metrics, cross-DAG lineage/dependency graph, JIRA/Confluence RAG context for known-issue matching
expected_rca.airflow_logs: Airflow shows Pricing DAG's sensor task waited 2h20m beyond its historical p95 wait time
expected_rca.datadog_metrics: Datadog cross-DAG lineage view (via Airflow lineage backend) shows the delay chain visually
expected_rca.resolution: Move to Airflow Datasets so Pricing can begin partial processing on partitions already reconciled, rather than waiting on the full upstream DAG.
expected_rca.preventive_action: Add cascade-risk scoring to the metadata model based on historical upstream-DAG duration variance, surfaced on a cross-domain dependency dashboard.
